rel="stylesheet"><style>*,*::before,*::after{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}html{scroll-behavior:smooth}:root{--bg:#1B3048;--bg2:#213858;--bg3:#284268;--blue:#00bcff;--teal:#00DDD0;--green:#8DD44E;--white:#FFFFFF;--muted:rgba(255,255,255,0.68);--cb:rgba(255,255,255,0.07);--cbr:rgba(255,255,255,0.13);--r:14px}.cd-page{background:var(--bg);color:var(--white);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;overflow-x:hidden}.hero{min-height:100vh;display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(300px,480px) minmax(560px,700px);justify-content:center;align-items:center;column-gap:72px;row-gap:0;padding:140px 64px 100px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(18,50,110,0.70) 0%,rgba(42,171,240,0.15) 35%,rgba(0,212,194,0.10) 65%,rgba(141,212,78,0.07) 100%)}.hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(30,159,232,0.06) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(30,159,232,0.06) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:56px 56px;mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 110% 100% at 55% 45%,black 0%,transparent 75%);pointer-events:none}.hero-glow-1{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;width:500px;height:500px;top:-100px;right:-60px;background:rgba(30,159,232,0.10);filter:blur(90px)}.hero-glow-2{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;width:360px;height:360px;bottom:-80px;left:-40px;background:rgba(0,196,180,0.08);filter:blur(80px)}.hero-glow-3{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;width:260px;height:260px;bottom:20%;left:30%;background:rgba(125,194,65,0.06);filter:blur(70px)}.hero-top{position:relative;z-index:2;grid-column:1;grid-row:1;align-self:end;padding-bottom:20px;text-align:center}.hero-bottom{position:relative;z-index:2;grid-column:1;grid-row:2;align-self:start;padding-top:20px;text-align:center}.hero-brand-logo{max-width:260px;width:100%;height:auto;display:block;margin:0 auto 28px;border-radius:16px;mix-blend-mode:luminosity;filter:brightness(1.05) contrast(1.1)}.hero-tag{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:rgba(30,159,232,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(30,159,232,0.22);border-radius:50px;padding:7px 18px;font-size:12px;color:var(--blue);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:32px;animation:fadeInDown .8s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) both}.tag-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--blue);animation:dotpulse 2s ease-in-out infinite}.hero h1{font-family:'Alfa Slab One',serif;font-size:clamp(40px,5vw,64px);font-weight:400;line-height:1.06;letter-spacing:-1px;margin-bottom:24px;animation:fadeInUp .9s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) .12s both}.grad{background:linear-gradient(125deg,var(--blue),var(--teal));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text}.hero p{font-size:17px;color:var(--muted);max-width:480px;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:40px;animation:fadeInUp .9s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) .24s both}.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:12px;justify-content:center;animation:fadeInUp .9s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) .36s both}.hero-right{position:relative;z-index:2;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;grid-column:2;grid-row:1/span 2;animation:fadeIn 1.2s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) .2s both}.orbital-card{position:relative;width:640px;height:640px;background:transparent;border:none;border-radius:32px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}.bokeh{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(50px);pointer-events:none}.bokeh.b1{width:160px;height:160px;background:rgba(0,188,255,0.18);top:-30px;left:-30px}.bokeh.b2{width:120px;height:120px;background:rgba(0,196,180,0.12);bottom:-20px;right:-20px}.bokeh.b3{width:90px;height:90px;background:rgba(125,194,65,0.10);bottom:50px;left:-10px}.orbital{position:relative;width:520px;height:520px}.ring{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(0,188,255,0.15);top:50%;left:50%}.ring-1{width:162px;height:162px;margin:-81px 0 0 -81px;border-color:rgba(0,188,255,0.32)}.ring-2{width:324px;height:324px;margin:-162px 0 0 -162px;animation:spinCW 24s linear infinite}.ring-3{width:486px;height:486px;margin:-243px 0 0 -243px;animation:spinCCW 36s linear infinite;border-color:rgba(0,188,255,0.12)}.orb-center{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);text-align:center;z-index:10}.orb-num{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:50px;font-weight:800;color:var(--blue);line-height:1;transition:opacity .4s ease,transform .4s ease}.orb-lbl{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:500;margin-top:4px;letter-spacing:.5px;transition:opacity .4s ease,transform .4s ease}.orb-center.fade-out .orb-num,.orb-center.fade-out .orb-lbl{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-8px)}.orb-center.fade-in .orb-num,.orb-center.fade-in .orb-lbl{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}.orbit-item{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;width:0;height:0}.orbit-badge{position:absolute;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);background:rgba(27,48,72,0.92);border:1px solid var(--cbr);border-radius:50px;padding:5px 12px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;white-space:nowrap}.ring-2 .orbit-item .orbit-badge{animation:spinCCW 24s linear infinite}.ring-3 .orbit-item .orbit-badge{animation:spinCW 36s linear infinite}.marquee-bar{border-top:1px solid var(--cbr);border-bottom:1px solid var(--cbr);background:rgba(11,17,32,0.6);padding:28px 0;overflow:hidden}.marquee-track{display:inline-flex;gap:0;animation:marquee 28s linear infinite;white-space:nowrap}.marquee-item{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:0;font-size:20px;font-weight:600;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);padding:0 auto}.s-tag{display:inline-block;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--blue);margin-bottom:18px}h2{font-family:'Alfa Slab One',serif;font-size:clamp(32px,3.5vw,52px);font-weight:400;line-height:1.1;letter-spacing:-0.5px;margin-bottom:20px}.section-sub{color:var(--muted);font-size:17px;max-width:560px;margin-bottom:64px;line-height:1.75}.sec-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;margin-bottom:56px}.sec-row h2{margin:0}.services-section{background:var(--bg2)}.svc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:16px}.svc-card{background:var(--cb);border:1px solid var(--cbr);border-radius:var(--r);padding:36px 28px;transition:border-color .3s,transform .3s,background .3s}.svc-card:hover{border-color:rgba(0,188,255,0.28);transform:translateY(-4px);background:rgba(0,188,255,0.04)}.svc-sym{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:22px;margin-bottom:22px}.svc-sym.b{background:rgba(0,188,255,0.12)}.svc-sym.t{background:rgba(0,196,180,0.12)}.svc-sym.g{background:rgba(125,194,65,0.12)}.svc-sym.p{background:rgba(139,92,246,0.12)}.svc-card h3{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px;letter-spacing:-.3px}.svc-card p{color:var(--muted);font-size:14px;line-height:1.7}.benefits-section{background:var(--bg)}.ben-intro{max-width:620px;margin-bottom:64px}.ben-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px}.ben-card{background:var(--cb);border:1px solid var(--cbr);border-radius:var(--r);padding:32px 28px;transition:border-color .3s,transform .3s}.ben-card:hover{border-color:rgba(139,92,246,0.30);transform:translateY(-4px)}.ben-check{width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(139,92,246,0.15);border:1px solid rgba(139,92,246,0.28);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:17px;margin-bottom:20px;color:#8B5CF6;flex-shrink:0}.ben-card h3{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px;letter-spacing:-.3px}.ben-card p{color:var(--muted);font-size:14px;line-height:1.72}.gallery-section{background:var(--bg2)}.gallery-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);grid-template-rows:auto auto;gap:16px}.pj{border-radius:var(--r);overflow:hidden;position:relative;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg3)}.pj.span2{grid-column:span 2}.pj-inner{width:100%;aspect-ratio:4/3;position:relative;overflow:hidden}.pj.span2 .pj-inner{aspect-ratio:16/7}.pj-bg{width:100%;height:100%;transition:transform .5s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1)}.pj:hover .pj-bg{transform:scale(1.06)}.pj-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(8,12,20,.95) 0%,rgba(8,12,20,.3) 55%,transparent 100%);display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;padding:24px 28px;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s}.pj:hover .pj-overlay{opacity:1}.pj-cat{font-size:11px;color:var(--blue);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:5px}.pj-title{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:700}.pj-ph{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px}.pj-ph-icon{font-size:32px;opacity:.3}.pj-ph-txt{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:500}.process-section{background:var(--bg)}.process-intro{max-width:520px;margin-bottom:72px}.process-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:0;position:relative}.process-grid::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:28px;left:calc(12.5% 24px}.step-num{width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--cb);border:1px solid var(--cbr);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:24px;position:relative;z-index:2}.step:nth-child(1) .step-num{border-color:rgba(0,188,255,.3);color:var(--blue)}.step:nth-child(2) .step-num{border-color:rgba(0,196,180,.3);color:var(--teal)}.step:nth-child(3) .step-num{border-color:rgba(125,194,65,.3);color:var(--green)}.step:nth-child(4) .step-num{border-color:rgba(139,92,246,.3);color:#8B5CF6}.step h3{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px;letter-spacing:-.3px}.step p{color:var(--muted);font-size:14px;line-height:1.7}.cta-section{background:var(--bg2);padding:120px 64px}.cta-box{max-width:820px;margin:0 p{color:var(--muted);font-size:18px;margin-bottom:44px;line-height:1.7}.cta-btns{display:flex;gap:12px;justify-content:center}.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:14px .2s}.btn-green{background:var(--green);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(125,194,65,.25)}.btn-green:hover{background:#5FA832;transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 32px fadeInUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(32px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}@keyframes fadeInDown{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-20px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}@keyframes spinCW{from{transform:rotate(0deg)}to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}@keyframes spinCCW{from{transform:rotate(0deg)}to{transform:rotate(-360deg)}}@keyframes dotpulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}50%{opacity:.4;transform:scale(1.7)}}@keyframes Como trabalhamos
